---
title: "Get Coding Help at the Libraries!"
subtitle: "Code4Lib 2026"
author:
  - name: "Alp Tezbasaran"
    email: "alptezbasaran@ncsu.edu"
  - name: "Shannon Ricci"
    email: "swbrown@ncsu.edu"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    incremental: false
    preview-links: auto
    chalkboard: true
    slide-number: true
---

<style>
/* Single title-slide logo, positioned above the horizontal line */
.reveal .slides section:first-child::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  top: -136px;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 540px;
  height: 150px;
  pointer-events: none;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center;
  background-size: contain;
  background-image: url("assets/ncstate-univlib-2x1-b-h-2clwht-rgb.png");
  z-index: 9999 !important;
}

/* Logo on every non-title slide without affecting layout flow */
.reveal .slides > section:not(#title-slide) {
  background-image: url("assets/ncstate-univlib-2x1-b-h-2clwht-rgb.png");
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: right 2px bottom 2px;
  background-size: 230px auto;
}
</style>

### Data Science Services at NC State

To make an unordered list in Quarto (Markdown), use dashes `-` or asterisks `*`.

- First item
- Second item
- Third item

---

### Data Science Services at NC State

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}
<span style="font-size:2em;" aria-label="Magnifying glass">🔍</span><br>
Data Science Consulting
:::
::: {.column width="33%"}
<span style="font-size:2em;" aria-label="Classroom">🎓</span><br>
Workshops & Instruction
:::
::: {.column width="33%"}
<span style="font-size:2em;" aria-label="Workstation">🖥️</span><br>
Specialized Spaces
<ul style="font-size:0.55em; margin-top: 6px;">
  <li>Even more powerful workstations</li>
  <li>Additional accessible software options</li>
  <li>Expert help with custom environment setup</li>
  <li>Longer and flexible reservations</li>
  <li>On-site technical support</li>
</ul>

:::
:::

---

## Second Slide

Add your second-slide content here.

---

## Questions?

<p class="thank-you-inline">THANK YOU</p>

<a href="mailto:you@example.com">you@example.com</a>
